name: Ko'olau Distillery
tagline: A veteran-owned craft distillery in Kailua making whiskey, rum, and gin — tours, tastings, trivia nights, and food trucks.
parking: Free parking in the Kapaa Quarry Pl industrial complex
hours: Mon & Wed 12pm–7pm. Tue 12pm–8pm. Thu 12pm–9pm. Fri 12pm–10pm. Sat 12pm–9pm. Sun 8am–7pm
bestTime: Thursday trivia nights or weekends for food trucks and live music. Afternoon tours at 1pm, 3pm, or 4pm
talkStory: Founded by a veteran-owned team in an industrial complex near the Kailua-Kaneohe border, Ko'olau quietly became one of Oahu's best hangout spots. Their Old Pali Road Whiskey is named after the haunted remnants of the original Pali Highway. Thursday trivia nights pack the tasting room with Windward locals, and weekends bring food trucks and live music to the outdoor area. The one-hour tour covers the full whiskey process from mashing to a 5-spirit tasting.
